query:
ALTER TABLE subscriptions 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS autoRechargeEnabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS autoRechargeThreshold INT DEFAULT 10000,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS autoRechargeAmount INT DEFAULT 20000,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastAutoRechargeAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS autoRechargeFailCount INT DEFAULT 0;
